title: Donate
subtitle: Your support helps us serve disadvantaged communities through impactful humanitarian programs.

items.title: Zakat Fund
items.description: Distribute Zakat to eligible families with dignity, transparency, and long-term impact.

items.title: Sadaqah Fund
items.description: Support urgent social needs including food, shelter, healthcare, and welfare initiatives.

items.title: Orphan Support
items.description: Help provide education, nutrition, and care for orphaned children in vulnerable communities.

items.title: Education Aid
items.description: Empower students with tuition support, books, and learning resources for a better future.

items.title: Emergency Relief
items.description: Respond quickly to disasters with life-saving assistance and emergency relief supplies.

items.title: Masjid & Community
items.description: Contribute to mosque development and community projects that strengthen faith and unity.
